storyInfo: At the border between dream and reality, Chongyue and Wang exchange words across the great divide. Fear and anger grip Sui. Wang lifts his sword, declaring the end of Sui's evolution.

attributes.content: ...Traitors.
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: You twelve, each and every one of you, plan to betray me, yes?
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: Indeed. None of us will submit to becoming a part of you.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We have lived as ourselves. This is why we are different from you.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Lived as... humans?
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: You see yourselves as human, and try to bring delusions varied to bear against me.
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: You relied on the power you stole from me, ingratiating yourselves with those puny insects, but you still had to humble yourselves, hiding your claws and fangs to make yourselves look harmless.
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: Is that what you mean by living as a human?!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: You still do not understand... You can never understand, for you have never lived.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: And I am well-aware... from where your arrogance stems.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: With but a glance, you can look from the beginning of time to its end. Though your consciousness has traversed the great void for eons, you have never had kin you could converse with.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You are simply a god declaring Itself supreme over a pitiful plot of empty space.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I know full well what this feeling was like.
Until the day someone gave me a name.
You are nobody's fate... Not the people of this land, or we twelve.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: And there is one thing you will never understand: against someone who already has nothing to his name...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: ...Fate is utterly powerless.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Very well... Since you dare to repeat your foolish challenge, I do not mind shattering your delusions once more.
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: I killed you once a hundred-and-twenty years ago! I shall kill you again with but a flick of my wrist!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: Is that meant to scare me?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I am already accustomed to losing.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I have already lost too many precious, precious things. I have lost the entire board.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: My dignity, my honor, my trust, my freedom, myself.
My family.
Did you really think someone with nothing more to lose would be afraid?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: But you?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Are you not afraid you will suffer another ignominious defeat, like a thousand years ago?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Is this fear not what makes you hesitate to step forward?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: ...A jest, at this hour!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: You desire in vain to replace me, to steal away my body. Why would I allow you to do as you please?!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: I need only stir this body awake first—
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: The Feranmut extends Its talons, talons as great as mountains.
Countless Feranmuts in countless Tombs extend Their talons, countless talons as great as mountains, and point them towards the same proxy.
It does not matter if this is a dream. So long as that loathsome face is wiped away in all of them, there will be nothing left to stop Its awakening.
What is this...
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: An incomparably brutal blow slams into Its body. A strength It is familiar with.
It knows, that in this split-second, It has lost Its connection with Its enormous body.
Who could cause such harm to Its form?!
The space shakes, then warps, and tears...
As if a thousand years worth of martial prowess has been channeled into a single strike, ripping apart the edges of the dream.
Why are you—
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Always so meddlesome!
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I knew you would say that.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: I also promised that, were things to arrive at this stage, I will be with you.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: Besides, I also wanted to bring her to meet you, to let you know that all your years of planning... were not for naught.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: Through the boundary between dream and reality, Wang sees the token Chongyue clutches to his bosom...
And then, their eyes meet.
You should leave...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Live.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: Live, and come back to us.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: I will not make you any promises.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The distance between them stretches with speed.
Even though he is a Grandmaster of kung fu, a thousand years old, a human body is still only a human body.
The force piercing the veil between truth and fiction quickly dissipates, but the voice of that brother Wang is so fed up with still reaches his ears.
Then I will look for you. I always will.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: Suit yourself.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What did he... What did he do?!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: But it does not matter! IT DOES NOT MATTER! No matter what he did, it was only for an instant... AN INSTANT!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: No longer shall he disturb us! Nor will any of your ludicrous, insignificant... siblings!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: This is my dream, with only you and I!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: I thought I would have to bring all my strength to bear to defeat you, but it seems you are still weak, still liable to collapse at the slightest of breezes. You only have a single stone left...
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: I will barely even have to lift my finger... to crush you! To annihilate you!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: And those poems, those laws, those martial arts... Such irksome pests. I need only use the strength I saved for you to isolate you from those meddlesome insects!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: You are unfit to die by my claws. You are only fit to be cut down by your reflection's blade... Now DIE!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: Hah... Is that so?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: To die is your end, not mine.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Yes. In all these causal chains, in all these possibilities, in all these dreams, you will die.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: These countless repetitions within this dream have eroded away, hollowed out your most frenzied imaginings. And all without you knowing.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Have you not noticed how intricately linked you and I are to this dream you used to trap me?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You have been chained by your hateful, vengeful impulses... Your evolution has reached its end.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: And we have already surpassed you.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: But your body will persist.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I... will take your place.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: And how will you do that? With your isolated stones, and with your own body, so ready to fall apart?!
attributes.name: Sui

attributes.content: You dare assume... I only have my stones... and this body of mine?!
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The near-dead proxy uses the last of his strength to lift his sword.
The deranged Feranmut gives one last howl of rage.

attributes.text: The cold moons split stones; the fierce sun chars boards...
\n\nAshes to ashes, a farewell to the ages.
